Name: Confeitaria do Bolhão
Tips: Est. 1896 Art Nouveau interior, opposite the market. Opens 6am.

Name: Mercado do Bolhão
Tips: Graze the stalls - fruit, cheese, petiscos, bifanas.

Name: Igreja do Carmo
Tips: Stunning azulejo facade. Alternative to Lello if sold out.

Name: Cais da Ribeira
Tips: UNESCO waterfront - coloured houses, rabelo boats. Best at night.

Name: Dom Luís I Bridge
Tips: Cross upper deck, walk back via lower level - different perspective each way.

Name: Neveiros
Tips: Pistachio affogato is the star. Go mid-morning when quieter.

Name: Igreja de São Francisco
Address: Rua do Infante D. Henrique, 4050-150 Porto
Tips: 300+ kg of gold leaf. Don't miss the ossuary in the basement.

Name: Taberna dos Mercadores
Tips: Tiny 16-seat gem. Best octopus rice in Porto. Email ahead.

Name: Rua das Flores
Tips: Porto's prettiest street - wrought-iron balconies, lit up at night.

Name: São Bento Station
Tips: 20,000+ azulejo panels. Quiet, different atmosphere in the evening.

Name: Torre dos Clérigos
Address: Rua de São Filipe de Nery, 4050-262 Porto
Tips: Spectacular illuminated at night. Free to admire from the square below.

Name: Casa da Bifana
Address: Near Rua de Passos Manuel, Porto
Tips: Iconic pork sandwich. Cheap, fast, open late.
